name: squared_relu
description: Fuse relu().square() → single Triton kernel (8 instances)

name: cuda_vec_add
description: Replace bf16 residual adds with vectorized CUDA kernel

name: softcap_fusion
description: Fuse softcap fwd (bf16→fp32+div+tanh+mul) and bwd (mul+tanh_bwd+div+to_bf16) into Triton kernels

name: lambda_scale
description: Fuse lambda scaling (a*x + b*x0) into single Triton kernel (8 instances)

name: sqrelu_bwd
description: Fuse squared relu backward (pow+mul+mul+to_copy+threshold_bwd → 1 kernel, 8 instances)

name: rope_fwd
description: Fuse forward RoPE (slice+mul+neg+mul+add+cat → 1 Triton kernel, 16 instances)
